sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useDispatch, useSelector} from 'react-redux' import { createOrder } from '../slices/order/orderSlice' import CheckoutSteps from '../components/CheckoutSteps' import FormContainer from '../components/FormContainer' import './PlaceOrderScreen.css' function PlaceOrderScreen() { const orderCreate = useSelector(state => state.orderCreate) const { order, error, success } = orderCreate const dispatch = useDispatch() const navigate = useNavigate() const cart = useSelector(state => state.cart) const userLogin = useSelector(state => state.userLogin) const { userInfo } = userLogin const itemsTotal = cart.cartItems.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.price * item.qty, 0).toFixed(2) cart.itemsPrice = itemsTotal ? itemsTotal : 0 cart.shippingPrice = (cart.itemsPrice > 100 ? 0 : 10).toFixed(2) cart.totalPrice = (Number(cart.itemsPrice) + Number(cart.shippingPrice)).toFixed(2) useEffect(() => { if(success){ navigate(`/order/${order.id}`) } }, [success, navigate]) const placeOrder = () => { dispatch(createOrder({ orderItems:cart.cartItems, shippingAddress:cart.shippingAddress, paymentMethod:cart.paymentMethod, itemsPrice:cart.itemsPrice, shippingPrice:cart.shippingPrice, totalPrice:cart.totalPrice })) } return (

Place Order

Contact information:
Email: {userInfo.email}

Shipping address:
Address: {cart.shippingAddress.address}
City: {cart.shippingAddress.city}
Postal Code: {cart.shippingAddress.postalCode}
Country: {cart.shippingAddress.country}

Payment method:
{cart.paymentMethod}

{error &&

{ error }

} Return to cart
{cart.cartItems.length === 0 ?

Your cart is empty

: (<> {cart.cartItems.map((item, index) => (

{item.name}
{item.price}€

Qty:
{item.qty}

Price:
{item.qty*item.price}€

))} )}

Subtotal: {cart.itemsPrice}€

Shipping: {cart.shippingPrice}€

Total: {cart.totalPrice}€

) } export default PlaceOrderScreen
